_comment: Golden expected processing order per PriorityStrategy (ADR-0011). The driver orders the eager enumeration by the named policy before --limit; the test fabricates these items+scores, drives block.run once per strategy, and asserts the recorded process() order equals `expected[name]`. d1/d2 tie at 2.0 to pin Greedy's STABLE tie-break (enumeration order: d1 before d2). Regenerate only when the seam's semantics change.
